reject_or_halt_condition: No pong inside max gap or gateway not responding
lecture_detail: Know whether connectivity is live before trusting the strategy state

check: Timestamp lag between market data, strategy, and order manager
reject_or_halt_condition: Data or order decision older than threshold
lecture_detail: Discard data if processing time exceeds the risk threshold

reject_or_halt_condition: Ask below bid, stale book, or event-spread blowout
lecture_detail: Bad vendor offsets can make an impossible order book

check: Margin, exposure, price-range, max value, and fat-finger bands
reject_or_halt_condition: Order breaches account, exchange, or strategy-defined limit
lecture_detail: Validate both strategy parameters and generated order fields

reject_or_halt_condition: New order would exceed limit before acknowledgements arrive
lecture_detail: Tick-by-tick logic must not fire faster than fills or acks confirm

check: Binary size, modified date, checksum, and version across every server
reject_or_halt_condition: Any server differs from the golden deployment
lecture_detail: Knight Capital failed because one of eight servers was stale

check: Runtime complexity and latency after every strategy change
lecture_detail: O(n), O(n^2), and O(n^3) behavior changes the number of symbols you can safely trade
